zh.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania是Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras的兒子，於1275年出生在立陶宛維爾尼奧斯 阿普斯可利迪斯維爾紐斯。他和Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna至少有10個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1341年12月在立陶宛陶拉蓋斯 阿普斯可利迪斯享年66歲，埋葬在利圖瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania是Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras的儿子，于1275年出生在立陶宛維爾尼奧斯 阿普斯可利迪斯維爾紐斯。他和Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna至少有10个儿子和7个女儿。他去世于1341年12月在立陶宛陶拉蓋斯 阿普斯可利迪斯享年66岁，埋葬在利圖瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Grand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, common in Scotland, where it is the name of a famous clan. It is derived from a nickname meaning ‘large’ (Anglo-Norman grand). In the United States the name is sometimes bestowed in honour of the Civil War general and 18th president, Ulysses S. Grant ( 1822–85 ).

nameMeanings.name: Duke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In modern use this normally represents a coinage parallel to   Earl   and   King  , but it has been used as a short form of   Marmaduke   from at least the early 1600s.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania was born in 1275, in Vilnius, Vilnius County, Lithuania as the son of Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras. He had at least 10 sons and 7 daughters with Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna. He died in December 1341, in Taurage County, Lithuania, at the age of 66, and was buried in Lithuania.

fr.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania est né en 1275, à Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Lituanie, fils de Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras. Il a eu au moins 10 fils et 7 filles avec Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna. Il est décédé en décembre 1341, à Tauragės Apskritis, Lituanie, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Lituanie.

de.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania wurde 1275 in Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Litauen, als Sohn von Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras geboren. Er hatte mit Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna mindestens 10 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1341 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Tauragės Apskritis, Litauen und wurde in Litauen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania è nato il nel 1275 nel Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Lituania come figlio di Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras. Lui avuto almeno 10 figli e 7 figlie con Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna. Morì nel dicembre 1341, nel Tauragės Apskritis, Lituania, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Lietuva.

ja.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuaniaは1275年にリトアニアヴィルニアウス アプスクリティスヴィルニウスでGrand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuverasの息子として生まれた。彼はPrincess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodnaとの間に少なくとも10人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1341年12月にリトアニアタウラグeス アプスクリティスで66歳で死去し，リートゥヴァにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania(은)는 1275년 리투아니아 비니오스 아프스크리티스 비니우스에서 Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1341년 12월 리투아니아 타라그e스 아프스크리티스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 리투바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania nasceu em 1275, em Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Lituânia filho de Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras. Ele teve pelo menos 10 filhos e 7 filhas com Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1341, em Tauragės Apskritis, Lituânia, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Lietuva.

ru.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania родился в 1275 г. в местности Вильнюс, вилняус апскритис, Литва. Его отца звали Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras. У него было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 7 дочерей от Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna. Он умер декабрь 1341 г. в местности таурагeс апскритис, Литва в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности Литва.

es.lifeSummary: Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania nació en 1275, en Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Lituania como hijo de Grand Duke Of Lithuania Butvydas Pukuveras. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos y 7 hijas con Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna. Murió en diciembre de 1341, en Tauragės Apskritis, Lituania, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Lietuva.
